famous quote:
Don't be fooled. Creativity does not reside in one special person. And it is not in one special place. It is everywhere and in everyone who has the courage to tap into his or her full potential. 
-Erik Wahl (in Unthink)
Interview Text:
When you Don't See Miracles:

But what if He doesn't come? Will all those hours on my knees be in vain, delaying my work because I think if I seek him first everything will still get done?

Maybe God's movement would be most effective to people in the form of just letting them feel known. Not as a copout to seeing God work, but maybe hearing words that God gives us to speak to others, more often than physical healing.  

-Raw Spoon (from Miracles in America)
Music Video Instructions: Imagine God telling you this is how he loves you. The predictibility of maps, is not what God offers. He offers relationship.
